title: QAOA for Portfolio Optimization
description: Apply the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) to solve portfolio optimization problems. Understand the algorithm's structure, parameter optimization, and performance characteristics.
learningObjectives: Understand the QAOA algorithm structure and its components
Implement QAOA circuits for portfolio selection problems
Optimize variational parameters using classical optimizers
Analyze QAOA performance and solution quality
Compare QAOA results with classical optimization
